name: HashTunes
tagline: A Hash Tune player and explorer that turns Chia blockchain blocks into playable music.
description:
HashTunes turns the Chia blockchain into music. Each block's header hash drives a sequence of notes, so pressing play on a block lets you literally *listen* to the chain.

## How it works

- **Explore** — browse the chain and inspect a block record: header hash, farmer puzzle hash, weight, and fees.
- **Play** — press play to turn the current block's header hash into a Hash Tune, with full transport controls (play, rewind, fast-forward, stop, loop).
- **Live chain data** — block records are read live from [coinset.org](https://coinset.org), so every Hash Tune reflects a real block on the Chia chain.

HashTunes is published on the DIG Network — this listing points at the on-chain-anchored copy served at `hashtunes.on.dig.net`.
